title: Update packit-build msg
body: Packit is trying to tag a group from the old org. https://github.com/orgs/containers/teams/packit-build cc @lsm5

comments.body: Implemented in https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/pull/29070 - points the Packit failure-notification mention at @podman-container-tools/packit-build (the message is on a single YAML anchor reused by all three jobs).
